tests.source_program:
define i8 @select_icmp_eq_signbit_explicit_mask(i8 %x) {
  %and = and i8 %x, -128
  %icmp = icmp eq i8 %and, 0
  %xor = xor i8 %x, -128
  %sel = select i1 %icmp, i8 %x, i8 %xor
  ret i8 %sel
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define i8 @select_icmp_eq_signbit_explicit_mask(i8 %x) {
  %and = and i8 %x, -128
  %icmp = icmp eq i8 %and, 0
  %xor = xor i8 %x, -128
  %sel = select i1 %icmp, i8 %x, i8 %xor
  ret i8 %sel
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions sign bit testing via sgt/slt predicates but does not explicitly cover using explicit sign bit mask (-128) with equality comparisons (eq/ne). The code handles this via m_Power2() matching but summary focuses on sgt -1/slt 0 patterns for sign bit.

  %sel = select i1 %icmp, i8 %x, i8 %xor

}

tests.source_program:
define <2 x i32> @select_icmp_ne_pow2_vector_i32(<2 x i32> %x) {
  %and = and <2 x i32> %x, <i32 8, i32 8>
  %icmp = icmp ne <2 x i32> %and, zeroinitializer
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %x, <i32 8, i32 8>
  %sel = select <2 x i1> %icmp, <2 x i32> %xor, <2 x i32> %x
  ret <2 x i32> %sel
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
define <2 x i32> @select_icmp_ne_pow2_vector_i32(<2 x i32> %x) {
  %and = and <2 x i32> %x, <i32 8, i32 8>
  %icmp = icmp ne <2 x i32> %and, zeroinitializer
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %x, <i32 8, i32 8>
  %sel = select <2 x i1> %icmp, <2 x i32> %xor, <2 x i32> %x
  ret <2 x i32> %sel
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary does not explicitly mention vector types. While code checks isIntOrIntVectorTy(), the summary text focuses on scalar patterns and existing tests only show i8 scalar examples. Vector type optimization is outside the documented scope.
